title: Red-Pill Policy Pack Schema
description: A policy pack is a versioned, reviewable collection of policy patches scoped to a specific language, framework, version range, or execution environment.

pack_id.description: Unique stable identifier for this pack, e.g. 'react-19-autoescape-fix'

pack_type.description: Which subdirectory this pack belongs in.

language.description: Target programming language, or '*' for all.

framework.description: Target framework key (e.g. 'react', 'django_jinja'), or '*' for all.

framework_version_range.description: Semver range like '>=18.0.0 <19.0.0' or '*' for all versions.

execution_contexts.description: Relevant execution contexts (user_browser, admin_browser, headless_browser_job, report_renderer) or ['*'] for all.

render_contexts.description: Relevant render contexts, or ['*'] for all.

sink_categories.description: Target sink categories, or ['*'] for all.

priority.description: Resolution priority within same specificity tier. Higher wins.

confidence.description: How confident we are this pack is correct and portable.

audit_references.description: Job IDs, intersection IDs, or run artifact paths that justify this pack.

regression_fixtures.description: Minimal test references for regression checks.
